---
title: "Accommodations"
subtitle: "Hotels by City"
date: "2026-06-04"
categories: [logistics, hotels, planning]
toc: true
---

## Overview

Accommodations for 16 nights across Italy (Florence, Naples, Puglia). All bookings confirmed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Florence (4 Nights: June 6–10)

### Confirmed Booking — Aurora apartments Piazzetta

**Aurora apartments Piazzetta**

| Detail           | Info                                            |
|------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| **Address**      | Via Por Santa Maria, 8, Florence, Tuscany 50122 |
| **Check-in**     | Saturday June 6, 4:00 PM                        |
| **Check-out**    | Wednesday June 10, **10:00 AM sharp**           |
| **Guests**       | Dan Green, Jane Mooney                          |
| **Confirmation** | HMMKBKP8JY                                      |
| **Platform**     | Airbnb                                          |
| **Host**         | Lorenzo: +39 055 093 0093                       |

**Location:** Via Por Santa Maria runs directly from Piazza della Signoria down to Ponte Vecchio — one of the most central streets in Florence. The Uffizi is steps away; the Duomo is a 10-minute walk north.

::: callout-warning
## Checkout Is 10:00 AM — Hard

Checkout is 10:00 AM sharp. The Italo train to Naples departs Florence at 12:28 PM — pack the night before (Day 5 evening) and plan to leave the apartment by 10:00 AM with bags. That gives roughly 2.5 hours before the train.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Naples (3 Nights: June 10–13)

### Confirmed Booking — Casa Wenner Large

**Casa Wenner Large — Naples Center Chiaia Plebiscito**

| Detail           | Info                                 |
|------------------|--------------------------------------|
| **Address**      | Via Monte di Dio, 66, Naples 80132   |
| **Check-in**     | Wednesday June 10, 3:00 PM           |
| **Check-out**    | Saturday June 13, **10:00 AM sharp** |
| **Guests**       | Daniel Green, Jane Mooney            |
| **Confirmation** | HMTBH3HCCX                           |
| **Platform**     | Airbnb                               |
| **Cost**         | \$826.57                             |

**Host contacts:** - Pierfrancesco: +39 335 607 1111 - Antonella: +39 320 118 6998

**Location:** Chiaia neighborhood — upscale, safe, excellent restaurants, 10-minute walk to the historic center and Spaccanapoli. Via Monte di Dio is a quiet street running up from the waterfront toward the hill.

::: callout-warning
## Checkout Is 10:00 AM — Hard

The Airbnb checkout is 10:00 AM with no flexibility. Pack the night before. On Day 9 (June 13), your flight to Brindisi isn't until 3:05 PM — the airport taxi departs around 1:30 PM — so you'll have 3+ hours with your bags after checkout. Ask about luggage storage or find a café nearby.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Puglia (6 Nights: June 13–19)

### Brindisi (1 Night: June 13–14)

**Confirmed Booking — Hotel Executive Inn**

| Detail         | Info                                               |
|----------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| **Hotel**      | Hotel Executive Inn                                |
| **Address**    | Via Pozzo Traiano, 24, Brindisi 72100              |
| **Check-in**   | Saturday June 13, 2:00 PM                          |
| **Check-out**  | Sunday June 14                                     |
| **Room**       | 1 Deluxe Double Room, 2 adults                     |
| **Platform**   | Expedia                                            |
| **Itinerary**  | 73435335535420                                     |
| **Total cost** | €166.48 (room €145.89 + taxes €14.59 + fees €6.00) |

Arriving from Brindisi airport at 6:25 PM — taxi to hotel is \~€12–15, 10–15 minutes. Check-in will be evening arrival, well after 2 PM opening.

### Puglia Tour (June 14–19)

Accommodations for the six-day Puglia tour are **included in the tour package** and will be confirmed by the tour operator.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Next:** See [Restaurants](restaurants.qmd) for dining recommendations by city.
